title: Potion of Haste
description: Allow you to obtain haste effect without building beacons
body:
# Haste Potion Coming!

Tired of building beacons for haste? Desire of haste effect in a large area?

This is an extremely light-weighed mod that allows you to acquire haste effect without building a beacon! 

Recipes are followed:
1.	Haste I (3 mins): Awkward potion + Golden apple
2.	Haste I (8 mins): Haste I (3 mins) + Redstone dust
3.	Haste II (1s): Haste I (3 mins) + Glowstone dust
4.	Haste II (3 mins): Haste II (1s) + Gold block
5.	Haste II (8 mins): Haste II (3 mins) + Redstone block

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-wPw0HXbaK8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Attention:

**All potions can be brewed from the brewing stand**

**All potions can be made into splash and lingering version**

Note: Please be aware of your game version and make sure to use **the newest Fabric API** for the version that you are playing on.

This mod will not add any new feature except the recipe described above, if you have any suggestions about balancing changes, please be in contact with contact details below.

The lowest version for this mod is 1.19, if you need it for lower version, please contact cmsf (cmsftech@gmail.com or 908381984@qq.com)

Enjoy!
